name: NINPOU: NOUSEI KOUYOU (NINJA ART: MEMORY ENHANCER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, S

You increase your brain activity, stimulating your memory and allowing you to explore your memory thoroughly. You gain a +4 insight bonus to all saves and checks that relate to events you have experienced in the past (for example, to help gather clues or form a conclusion based on reviewing memories of the investigation) (GM's discretion).

This technique can only be used once per day, and once it ends you become fatigued. You also take 1d6 temporary Intelligence damage (Fortitude DC 18 negates).
